rationale: The cited paper appears conceptually close to the citing paper’s core mechanisms: both focus on predecisional preference construction/attribute-weighting distortions and motivated-reasoning-like processing in consumer choice (citing note: simplifying/complicating via weighting shifts; cited note: overweighting common attributes, process evidence on missing values). Given this overlap and the citing paper’s explicit positioning against prior bolstering/simplification work, this is not clearly an incidental background mention and should be reviewed in full.
